## Prior Art

List source-candidate or verified references. Do not present unverified
benchmark research as public proof.

## Public / Private Boundary

- [ ] No secrets, customer data, private operator context, or production-only details.
- [ ] Any source-candidate material is labeled.
- [ ] Any public claim has a receipt or is marked pending/planned.

## Receipts Required

- [ ] Source receipts
- [ ] Test or fixture receipts
- [ ] Security review if applicable
- [ ] License/trademark/brand/commercial-use review if applicable
- [ ] Public/private boundary review

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Scope is small enough for a reversible PR.
- [ ] Non-goals are explicit.
- [ ] Evidence requirements are clear.
- [ ] Reviewer can verify success without private context.
